# CWE-214 positive: secret passed on process command line
lang: go
file: CWE-214-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os/exec"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-214 Invocation of Process Using Visible Sensitive Information
// Vulnerable line: API token appears in argv for pg_dump helper.
func BackupDatabase(c *gin.Context) {
	token := c.GetHeader("X-Api-Token")
	cmd := exec.Command("pg_dump", "--token", token, "--db", "billing")
	if err := cmd.Run(); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "backup"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "started"})
}
